commentary_text: The market views Turkey as a strong favorite at 55%, compared to the model's 36%—a 19-percentage-point gap favoring Turkey at the sportsbooks. Simultaneously, the market assigns Australia only 19% to win versus the model's 32%, a 13-point gap in the other direction. This sharpening of conviction could reflect recent form, injury status, or lineup changes that the model has not yet incorporated; sportsbooks and traders may have visibility into team news or performance trends unavailable to the statistical forecast. The dashboard surfaces this substantial divergence as a signal worth monitoring, without adjudicating which source better reflects ground truth.
